title: ZNetwork — NewLatest/ZNetwork canonical, stack attach-only
motto: Work outside the integrated stack. No wide open. Lab gate before SHADOW; double gate before ACTIVE.

outside_copy.purpose: Isolated C++ core + scripts + checklist — develop and test without mutating NewLatest tree
outside_copy.newlatest_znetwork_dir: NewLatest/ZNetwork — canonical only; no SG sibling
outside_copy.never_copy_binary_into_newlatest: build here; NewLatest resolves ZNETWORK_ROOT to this tree

field_bridges_readonly.note: Lab may call NewLatest Python bridges read-only — never ACTIVE handoff from lab without checklist
